amendment_if_yes_amended: Prioritize fixes based on impact and urgency
rationale: Fixing critical errors autonomously reduces risk and improves system stability. Prioritizing by impact ensures maximum benefit.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed fixes may lead to increased technical debt and potential security vulnerabilities
